sam-ā-√jñā to know or understand thoroughly, become acquainted with, ascertain, perceive, observe, recognize,  MBh. ;  Hariv. ;  Vet.  :
Caus. -jñāpayati or -jñapayati (cf. next), to order, command, direct, authorize,  MBh. ;  R.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
samājñā (1. jñā mit samā) f.
1〉 (anerkannte) Benennung, Name  LĀṬY. 6,10,28  (samākhyā v. l.).  TAITT. UP. 3,10,2 . = jñāna, vijñāna, upāsana  ŚAṂK. 
— 2〉 Ruhm  AK. 1,1,5,12  (nach  ŚKDR.  eine von  BHARATA  erwähnte v. l. für samajñā des Textes).  H. 273 .
— Vgl. samajyā und samākhyā.

results.rendered_html:
samājñā 9 U.
1 To know or understand thoroughly, learn or ascertain fully.
2 To recognize, acknowledge.
— Caus. To order, command.
